title: T-029 — Outbox emitters: matrix.version.published + assignment.overridden + bulk_approved
prompt:
# T-029 — Outbox emitters: matrix.version.published + assignment.overridden + bulk_approved

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §9.8, §17.1 PLE-013, §17.1 PLE-004 FR-07-PLE-004-02
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement remaining scheduler-domain outbox emitters for matrix version publish (PLE-013), assignment override audit, and the batched bulk_approved event with array payload.

## Implementation contract
1. Extend `apps/web/src/lib/outbox/emitters/scheduler.ts` (built in T-028) with:
   - `emitMatrixVersionPublished(version, changedCellsCount)`
   - `emitAssignmentOverridden(assignment, override)`
   - `emitAssignmentsBulkApproved(assignmentIds: string[])` (array payload)
2. All inserts transactional. Zod payload schemas per §9.8.
3. Update tests to cover the three new emitters.

## Files
- apps/web/src/lib/outbox/emitters/scheduler.ts [modify]
- apps/web/src/lib/outbox/emitters/__tests__/scheduler.test.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a transaction + new matrix version, when emitMatrixVersionPublished called, then outbox_events row event_type='scheduler.changeover_matrix.updated' inserted with version_id + changed_cells_count
2. Given an override action, when emitAssignmentOverridden called, then outbox_events row event_type='scheduler.assignment.overridden' inserted with reason_code + reason_notes
3. Given a bulk_approved batch of 5 assignment_ids, when emitAssignmentsBulkApproved called, then exactly ONE outbox_events row event_type='scheduler.assignments.bulk_approved' inserted with array payload of 5 ids

## Test strategy
- RED: extend __tests__/scheduler.test.ts to cover all 3 new emitters; assert array payload shape on bulk_approved
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test outbox/emitters/scheduler'

## Risk red lines
- Do not emit per-id row in bulk_approved (must be one batched row)
- Do not skip transactional guard on any emitter
- Do not invent new event_type names beyond §9.8 list

pipeline_inputs.description: Add 3 emitters: matrix.version.published, assignment.overridden, assignments.bulk_approved (single batched row).
pipeline_inputs.details: Extends T-028 module with three emitters. bulk_approved must always be a single outbox_events row with array payload regardless of batch size.
out_of_scope: Do not implement matrix.review.requested here (covered by T-041 server action)
Do not implement forecast.uploaded here (P2-only event)
